pages.title: Affinity Is Metadata
pages.text: MTF records affinities such as:$(li)Enchanting$(li)Resonance$(li)Fortune$(li)Fire$(li)Echo$(p)Affinity is metadata. MTF does not turn it into stronger enchantments or extra loot by itself. Without another integration, only the numeric effects printed here apply.

pages.title: Better Enchanting
pages.text: Better Enchanting reads construction materials through its own rules.$(p)$(bold)Each gold component:$()$(br)+1 enchantment capacity$(p)This is separate from:$(li)Conductive affinity$(li)Gilded's XP bonus$(p)The three mechanics are not interchangeable.

pages.title: Apotheosis Affixes
pages.text: Apotheosis affixes and socketed gems are external equipment layers.$(p)MTF preserves compatible components during:$(li)Stat recalculation$(li)Repair$(li)Renaming$(li)Modular updates$(p)Their exact effects remain governed by Apotheosis, not MTF traits.
